case_title: GEORKESHIA DENISE CAMPBELL VS. ROGER BOREN ET AL

docket_entries.description: "THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY COURT. DEFENDANTS VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED", BY JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT BUT WERE REPRESENTED BY CAMILLA KIELIGER--JUDICAL COUNCIL COURT ANALYST. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
